mapper.insert: INSERT INTO courses ( user_id, name, teacher, location, day_of_week, start_time, end_time, start_week, end_week, semester, color, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{name}, #{teacher}, #{location}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{startWeek}, #{endWeek}, #{semester}, #{color}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, teacher, location, day_of_week, start_time, end_time, start_week, end_week, semester, color, status, created_at, updated_at FROM courses WHERE id = #{id} AND status != 0

SELECT id, user_id, name, teacher, location, day_of_week, start_time, end_time, start_week, end_week, semester, color, status, created_at, updated_at FROM courses WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status != 0 ORDER BY day_of_week ASC, start_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE courses SET name = #{name}, teacher = #{teacher}, location = #{location}, day_of_week = #{dayOfWeek}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, start_week = #{startWeek}, end_week = #{endWeek}, semester = #{semester}, color = #{color}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE courses SET status = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, teacher, location, day_of_week, start_time, end_time, start_week, end_week, semester, color, status, created_at, updated_at FROM courses WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND day_of_week = #{dayOfWeek} AND status != 0 ORDER BY start_time ASC

SELECT id, user_id, name, teacher, location, day_of_week, start_time, end_time, start_week, end_week, semester, color, status, created_at, updated_at FROM courses WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND semester = #{semester} AND status != 0 ORDER BY day_of_week ASC, start_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM courses WHERE status != 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM courses WHERE status != 0 AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT id, user_id, name, teacher, location, day_of_week, start_time, end_time, start_week, end_week, semester, color, status, created_at, updated_at FROM courses WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE courses SET status = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{courseId}
